title: Move category tag next to live viewer count and remove LIVE badge in chatroom header

requirements.summary: Remove the LIVE badge from the chatroom header component
acceptanceCriteria: The LIVE badge is no longer rendered anywhere in the chatroom header.
No other elements are affected by this removal.

file_operations.description: Remove the LIVE badge element from the chatroom header section. Locate the badge rendering logic (likely conditional on isLive status) and delete it entirely, preserving all other header elements and their structure.

requirements.summary: Move the category tag into the same row as the messages count and live viewer count, positioned to the right of the live viewer count
acceptanceCriteria: The category tag appears in the same row as the messages count and live viewer count.
The category tag is positioned to the right of the live viewer count.
The title has its own line above with full available width, unaffected by the category tag.
No CSS classes, colors, sizes, or any other styles are changed on any elements.

file_operations.description: Restructure the chatroom header layout to move the category tag element into the same flex row as the messages count and live viewer count. Position it to the right of the live viewer count without modifying any className, style, or other attributes on any element. Ensure the chatroom title remains on its own separate line above this row with full width available.
